hf54e6ba7g567bg41abga4a7g0270cd6805fa: Hrast, another one! Keep back, flatface - I know how to handle myself!
hcb11791agb078g4fbag872ag6ca9537344ff: Take it easy, I'm only disguised as a gith.
h953386ebgb09fg4b5fg99c7gcdaf851897c0: What? Why...? Never mind. I don't want to know.
h1378cbfeg5b32g4c8bga480g637aeac494b3: So... you not looking to make trouble for me, are you? Whatever you are?
he39c67f7g8f98g4833gaf94g01b79dcc179d: ... good. I've enough trouble as it is - look at that lot down there.
ha0a454d0g92c3g4f0fgacfcgff3664faf393: Those things you're masquerading as. Armed to the teeth. And they've a dragon.
h7bf6c791g34bfg43c6gb138g4b8e24903215: I was counting on crossing that bridge and heading to Baldur's Gate. To safety.
h66979fb8gf202g4d71g943cga5db9fe79b94: Now I've got to find another way around. If you're smart, you will too. You're no match for that lot.
h92021c59g7531g4705ga20dg9734c6e40616: Don't follow me - find your own way.
h588cb47eg9b17g4e80gab55ga51e22069576: Nobody. Just another hrasting fool trying to stay alive. There's plenty of us around.
hfd2bdd3dgb140g498egbfa4g5961c41f92c3: Seems you have good survival instincts - maybe you should join me instead.
h6abf69f8gf4b0g4509g9438g1f92182900b6: Now I've got to find another way around. Take your chances against that lot if you like.
h796431a0gb27ag458dgbc19ge2e7f34a13e7: That's how you want it... fine.
hc109fdf0g3562g4b5cgb0bdg3b83a9f608a1: You're not like that lot at the bridge. I reckon I can handler you... come on!
h229c391dg5e3ag45f7g9c64gd79cfa1a5ebb: Let's see if you're actually as tough as your disguise makes you... come on!
hd713aedfg6f8cg4cdag85e0g78cab60ba13d: Your hrasting friends are swarming all over the bridge down there.
h88bf331fge46eg4262gafcbge8968720191b: I won't let you warn them.
hc648dd19gab9eg4cd8gb40cg812a4f0ca9bf: It's a disguise. I'm not really a gith.
h362d8e93gab8eg4cd1gb12ag81a2d1bc7a45: Actually forget it. I need to get moving; there has to be another way to Baldur's Gate.
h46e7285fg0222g4786g90dfg448dd1d66e8d: I'd keep clear of that lot on the bridge unless you think your disguise'll fool them.
heea1f158ga921g4a66g87a8gb9c5cf290639: That lot on the bridge are out for blood. Hope your disguise holds, if you try to get past.
h7ba7af56gef07g4d15ga589gd4139398fda0: If there are gith at the bridge, they're nothing to me.
h849a2070gf4fag44beg95dfg6335e18ce0d9: ... all right. I'm leaving. I have to get to Baldur's Gate. Don't follow. And not a word to them.
h56ae9490g76a8g46c8ga09dg26920c8e81a3: I have kin nearby? I should seek them out.
hff1c63d2ge589g48c7g984bg686da5dd83c2: First and last warning - lower that weapon.
h61727c3ag3c1eg497bg9efag9e66e3e44592: I'll drop it when you're dead.
h0ce9542agcd63g4857gaaefg5c88c1b8600e: Your friends at the bridge are too much for me to take on... but I reckon I can handle you.
hdc51044ag8d7dg44d9g94f7gb7ab7db3f629: I have no interest in harming you, unless you force my hand.
hdf2fc224ge0c8g4c00g9ab2g69faeb6f5e40: ... aren't you with that other lot? Down at the bridge? The ones with the dragon?
h07476550gf574g4fecga4a2g1f1495ee5b42: All right. Maybe we don't have a problem then. Maybe.
hbb1217d6g5a97g4f4ag9518gb325a55ecaf5: That bridge was going to be my passage to Baldur's Gate. To safety. Now I've to find another way.
hf5bbe5f5gc853g49c7g9e90g42849ac3acda: I'm leaving. Don't follow. Don't tell them you saw me.
hf6e6e53egee64g4e43gb72cgbc61540585f1: They're out for blood. Unless you're in good standing with them, I'd keep clear.
h49862040g5213g49degb6b8gcaedea88c0f3: They're out for blood. I hope you're in good standing with them.
h28f27cbbg99b0g47c8gb4efgca50fc23a904: I am not with them. But perhaps they will listen to me.
h5835100ag986fg4329ga137gabbc0f81343c: They may be my kin. I will investigate.
h21d5a5e0g27c9g42beg8c1bg7d0269248516: Then we've a problem. I can't have you running off to tell your friends about me.
h65013d01g4dd3g4682g869ag0c1cffc016a3: That lot are too much for me to take on... but I reckon I can handle you, mragreshem.
h0a2a67bbgee38g44eag9c4bge0f5dd4e1898: I'm going to have to be sure you stay quiet, mragreshem.
h371d5f7ag22cbg4e39g8322g39c3dfbb45f0: Calm yourself. I am not who you think I am.
h3bf8ba74g5788g4411g9d9egea45d20cea22: Come on, mragreshem! I'll take my chances against you than your friends on the bridge!
h509c9ae9gda23g45ebga745g7f2a0f9f884a: What are you doing?! Hold up, before they see you, mragreshem!
h5dc2ffc8gae0cg4f00ga2e5g79a243b9af21: What, apart from the dragon? Look...
hc672f142g98bbg4905gbeabg4a61c3a7a981: That lot are swarming all over the bridge. I don't know what they want, but it can't be good.
hb7a112acg4c8ag4fddg9b3fg06b2de937202: I'm going to find another way around. You ought to do the same.
h6f24ff3cg3133g4ea3ga42bg97f4cc00704d: I doubt a fight against them would go your way.
h30e5a8f5g36a1g4e9cgb427g99a5579bf18d: ... unless you're looking for a fight, that is.
h71f50b5cg32c1g46c9ga603g5508c9e89115: Nobody. Just another hrasting fool trying to get to Baldur's Gate in one piece.
h408e47adga764g403agafa6g200d3623fc9e: I might've been concerned, had I the slightest idea who 'they' are...
h5e1790aag9ef3g4f2ega4f4g59907ee5f08c: Whatever you just called me, I didn't like the sound of it. Watch your tongue.
h7085b208g9ffcg4e75g8de9g081cd5024709: Got more important things to watch than my hrasting tongue. Look...
h4575bf8ag83efg4486gb91ag1c25d4e74237: You're the mragreshem for taking that tone with me.
h48da01b9gd3b4g4571g8570g8a8267718ffb: Spare me. There's bigger problems right now that my manners. Look...
hdd39e697g1f5cg42b1gba67g5a2b4ec46018: Listen - avoid the bridge. I doubt a fight with that lot would go your way, no offence.
h04526f6egdd9eg463dg8216g825a9176b468: I'm getting out of here. There's got to be another way to Baldur's Gate. Good luck.
h5444444ag9019g4598g82fbgc510bdb70aec: What? You going to try get past that lot? Better you than me.
